summary: Completed testing of new QuoteMaster Pro features: Password Reset, Excel Template Download, General Discount, PDF Settings, and Email/WhatsApp Sharing. Fixed critical bug in backend QuoteResponse model missing general_discount fields. 11/12 backend tests passed (1 skipped).

critical.issue: FIXED - Missing general_discount_type, general_discount_value, general_discount_amount fields in response model

minor.issue: Requires RESEND_API_KEY to be properly configured - currently uses placeholder 're_your_api_key_here'

passed_tests: Password Reset - /forgot-password page loads with form elements
Password Reset - Form submission shows success message
Password Reset - /reset-password?token=invalid shows Turkish error message
Password Reset API - POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns 200
Password Reset API - POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid token returns 400
Password Reset API - GET /api/auth/verify-reset-token with invalid token returns 400
Excel Template - GET /api/products/template/excel returns 200 with XLSX content
Excel Template - Products page shows 'Şablon' button (download-template-btn)
PDF Settings - Settings page shows PDF Detay Ayarları card
PDF Settings - Ürün Görselleri (show images) switch present
PDF Settings - Görsel Boyutu (image size) select present
PDF Settings - Ürün Açıklaması (description length) select present
PDF Settings API - PUT /api/auth/profile updates pdf_show_images, pdf_image_size, pdf_description_length
General Discount - New Quote page shows 'Genel İskonto' selector
General Discount - Options: İskonto Yok, Yüzde (%), Tutar (TL)
General Discount API - POST /api/quotes with percent discount works
General Discount API - POST /api/quotes with amount discount works
General Discount API - Response includes general_discount_type, value, amount
Email Sharing - Quote Detail shows 'E-posta' button
Email Sharing - Email dialog opens with recipient input, message textarea, send button
WhatsApp Sharing - Quote Detail shows 'WhatsApp' button
action_items: Configure RESEND_API_KEY in backend/.env for actual email sending functionality
critical_code_review_comments: Backend QuoteResponse model was missing general_discount fields - FIXED by adding general_discount_type, general_discount_value, general_discount_amount to the model

success_rate.backend: 100% (11/11 passed, 1 skipped due to email API key)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (All new feature UI elements present and working)

seed_data_creation: Created test users with prefix 'apitest', 'fulltest', 'uitest', 'test_discount', 'test_reset', 'test_pdf' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Password Reset, Excel Template, General Discount, PDF Settings, Email/WhatsApp Sharing) tested and working. QuoteResponse model was fixed to include general_discount fields. RESEND_API_KEY is MOCKED with placeholder value - actual email sending not tested.
mocked_api_note: Email sending (RESEND_API_KEY) and Iyzico subscription are MOCKED

bug_fix_applied.description: Added missing fields to QuoteResponse model in server.py
